resources.string: Thank you for supporting Apex Play
Watch a short ad to earn +%1$d Boost Credits
%1$s won\'t work unless you enable Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device.
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device.
%1$s won\'t run unless you update Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are currently updating.
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
✅ Settings applied! Restart your game for changes to take effect.
Lower shadows first for biggest FPS gain.
Reduce resolution on devices below 4GB RAM.
Clear RAM before starting heavy gaming sessions.
Keep device cool — temps above 45°C throttle performance.
Use Wi-Fi for lowest ping in competitive games.
Plug in charger during extended gaming sessions.
Date does not match expected pattern: %1$s
Date out of expected year range %1$s - %2$s
"Swipe to select a year, or tap to switch back to selecting a day"
Scroll to show the next month
Scroll to show the previous month
Optimal balance between performance and battery life.
Pushes all device limits for top benchmark scores.
Maximum gaming performance. Recommended for competitive play.

string.description: This string appears within a window that describes an ad's contents. It indicates that the following text would be the body field (textual content) of the native ad. [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: native_body

string.description: This string appears within a window that describes an ad's contents. It indicates that the following text would be the headline field (title) of the native ad. [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: native_headline

string.description: This string appears within a window that describes an ad's contents. It indicates that the following image / video would be the media view field (graphical content) of the native ad. [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: native_media_view

string.description: Label on the button to go to settings. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]
string.name: notifications_permission_confirm

string.description: Label on the button to decline going to settings. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]
string.name: notifications_permission_decline

string.description: Body of the dialog presented when an ad wants to grant notifications permission. [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: notifications_permission_title

resources.string: Allow app to send you notifications?

string.description: Describes content of the offline dialog image view. This property is used primarily for accessibility. [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: offline_dialog_image_description

string.description: Confirmation text displayed when the user opts in to get a notification. [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: offline_dialog_text

resources.string: Thanks for your interest.\nWe will share more once you\'re back online.

string.description: Title of the notification which directs the user to the landing page of the ad. [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: offline_notification_title

resources.string: You are back online! Let\'s pick up where we left off

string.description: Title of the notification which directs the user to the landing page of the ad. Includes the advertiser name [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: offline_notification_title_with_advertiser

resources.string: You are back online! Continue learning about %s

string.description: Label on the button to opt in to a notification later when the user is back online. [CHAR_LIMIT=12]
string.name: offline_opt_in_confirm

string.description: Label on the button to decline to get a notification later when the user is back online. [CHAR_LIMIT=12]
string.name: offline_opt_in_decline

string.description: Body of the dialog presented when an ad is clicked while offline. [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: offline_opt_in_message

resources.string: We\'ll send you a notification with a link to the advertiser site.

string.description: Title of the dialog presented when an ad is clicked while offline. [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: offline_opt_in_title

resources.string: Open ad when you\'re back online.
Subscriptions auto-renew unless cancelled 24h before renewal.\nCancel anytime in your account settings.
Subscribe via our website to avoid the 15–30%% app store commission — same features, better price. Your subscription syncs automatically to the app.
Save up to 25%% with Web Billing
Close all background apps before playing and re-apply GFX settings after any in-game graphics change for best performance.
"Allow Ad to store image in Picture gallery?"
Allow Ad to create a calendar event?
This app does not collect personal data or modify game files. You can use this app freely and safely. We are not affiliated with Tencent.
Clear RAM before matches using Quick Boost.
Switch to 5GHz Wi-Fi or wired LAN for best response.
Plug in charger — battery saver throttles CPU.
Disable background sync and cloud backups during play.
Get +3 Boost Credits — free, every day
Unlimited boosts · No ads · AI coaching
Exclusive deals from brands trusted by pro gamers. These are curated sponsorships — never random ads.
Payment processed securely via Google Play Billing
Use Speed Tokens to run network optimization passes for the lowest ping.
✅ You have unlimited boosts with your %1$s plan!
Automatically boost when game is detected
Kill unused apps to free memory
Limit boost intensity to save battery
Apply CPU governor settings for gaming
Switch device to gaming mode on game launch
Reduces input lag for smoother play
Optimize network for low latency gaming
Get notified when boost is active

string.description: This string appears within a watermark on video ads for debugging. [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: watermark_label_prefix

resources.string: Will kill background apps and optimize %1$s mode
